case_title: NYDIA E. ROSALES VS. MIA GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,100.00 FILED BY ROSALES, NYDIA E. AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, MIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
